required_refs.description: 3/4 portrait, neutral expression, photoreal DAZ3D CGI, head and shoulders, short cropped black hair just above the ears with fringe just above the eyebrows, brown eyes, fair-medium Japanese complexion, strikingly beautiful, age 32, vogue-cover glamour lighting, neutral grey backdrop

Composite showing Yuna at tier 2, tier 4, and tier 6 side-by-side in NASA flight suit (tiers 2 and 4) and cosmic peak bodysuit (tier 6), all body proportions matching the canonical lineup figure for those tiers, full body fronts in T-pose, photoreal DAZ3D CGI on a neutral grey backdrop
Tier-2 Yuna in NASA flight suit shown front / three-quarter / profile / back in a 2x2 grid composite, neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D
NASA/JAXA blue flight suit, zipped to collar, HOSHINO name tag visible on left chest, JAXA flag patch on right shoulder, shown front and back side-by-side, neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D
Cosmic peak bodysuit — sleek iridescent black bodysuit with star-pattern energy lines, shown front and back side-by-side on tier-6 Yuna body, neutral grey backdrop, photoreal DAZ3D

Wide establishing shot of the International Space Station observation cupola interior — seven angled windows with Earth's curvature visible curving below, control panels with backlit indicators, padded handholds along the bulkhead, distant ISS modules visible through one window, deep-space blackness through the others, no character in frame, photoreal CGI
